message:
fix(codegen): Always use __global_allocator for consistent memory handling

- Replace conditional allocator name (allocator vs __global_allocator) with
  consistent __global_allocator usage across all codegen files
- Add isIteratorBuiltin() to skip vtable generation for iterator builtins
  (enumerate, filter, map, zip, reversed, range, etc.)
- Fix allocator syntax errors from sed replacement
- Add REPO_ROOT constant to test/support/os_helper.zig

Files changed:
- codegen/native/builtins/conversions/*: Use __global_allocator
- codegen/native/expressions/*: Use __global_allocator
- codegen/native/statements/*: Use __global_allocator
- codegen/native/methods/float.zig: Use __global_allocator
- statements/functions/generators/builtin_types.zig: Add isIteratorBuiltin()
- statements/functions/generators.zig: Skip iterator builtins from vtables
